etymology.description: semantic 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") + phonetic 見(見) (jiàn, "see") -> to appear
etymology.interpretation: 現(現) (jiàn, "see") acts as the phonetic component indicating pronunciation, while the semantic component 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") suggests something valuable or significant that becomes visible, leading to the meaning 'to appear; now'.
etymology.simplification: 現(現) was simplified to 现(現) by replacing the semantic component 見(見) (jiàn, "see") with its simplified form 见.

examples.chinese: 现在是时候出发了(現在是時候出發了)。
examples.english: Now is the time to depart.

examples.chinese: 他突然出现在门口(他突然出現在門口)。
examples.english: He suddenly appeared at the door.

examples.chinese: 这幅画在博物馆中展现(這幅畫在博物館中展現)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè fú huà zài bówùguǎn zhōng zhǎnxiàn.
examples.english: This painting is exhibited in the museum.
